jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Fire-Boltt - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Fire-Boltt! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Fire-Boltt:
Fire-Boltt is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fire-Boltt!
